title: How to Start a Beauty Career in Nepal — Complete Guide
excerpt: Thinking of becoming a professional beautician? Everything you need to know about beauty courses, CTEVT certification and building your career in Nepal.
body:
# How to Start a Beauty Career in Nepal

Nepal's beauty industry is growing rapidly. Natural Beauty Clinic & Academy offers professional training to help you build a successful beauty career.

## Step 1: Choose Your Specialization
- Makeup Artist
- Hair Stylist
- Nail Technician
- Skin Care Specialist

## Step 2: Enroll in a Certified Course

At Natural Beauty Clinic & Academy, we offer:
- Professional Makeup Course
- Hairdressing Course
- Skin & Facial Course
- Nail Extension & Nail Art Course

## Step 3: Get Certified

Our certificates are recognized and help you get jobs in salons, start your own business or work internationally.

## Why Choose Natural Beauty Academy?

✅ Practical hands-on training from day one
✅ Expert instructors with 20+ years experience
✅ Free demo classes available
✅ Limited seats — enroll now!

**Call / WhatsApp: 9843805588**
New Baneshwor, Kathmandu — Beside Laxmi Sunrise Bank
author: Natural Beauty Team
